div.h2: Test Matrix — M1 Expected Input → Token Stream
div.p: TDD Red-Green Reference: scan_tokens() exact output for three canonical inputs

✅ Single-char dispatch via SINGLE_CHAR_TOKENS ✅ Whitespace consumed silently (spaces at cols 2,4,6) ✅ 4 real tokens + 1 EOF = 5 total ✅ len(tokens) == 5 ✅ tokens[-1].type == EOF ✅ Column tracks: each token 2 apart (char + space)
advance('+') → col=2 advance('\n') → line=2, col=1 advance('-') → col=2 EOF appended: line=2, col=2
✅ \n increments self.line, resets self.column ✅ MINUS reports line=2, not line=1 ✅ EOF.column = 2 (one past the -) ✅ len(tokens) == 3 ✅ tokens[-1].type == EOF ✅ No token emitted for \n (whitespace)
"@" 1 char, unrecognized not in any token class
_scan_token() fallthrough hit _error_token() called ERROR appended — no exception raised scan_tokens() loop continues is_at_end() → True → append EOF

✅ Unrecognized char → ERROR token (not exception) ✅ ERROR.lexeme == '@' ✅ ERROR.line == 1, ERROR.column == 1 ✅ Scanning continues after error ✅ len(tokens) == 2 (ERROR + EOF) ✅ tokens[-1].type == EOF ✅ EOF.column == 2 (cursor past @)

Rule: token.column = value of self.column at _begin_token() call advance(ch) → if ch=='\n': line++, col=1 else: col++ Position snapshot frozen at _begin_token() — not at _make_token() Scenario A column derivation: '+ - * /' → indices 0–7 +=idx0 → col 1 │ (space idx1 → col 2, discarded) -=idx2 → col 3 │ (space idx3 → col 4, discarded) *=idx4 → col 5 │ (space idx5 → col 6, discarded) /=idx6 → col 7 │ EOF → col 9 (after /, col=8; then scan_tokens appends EOF with col=8... wait: after consuming /, col becomes 8; EOF.col=8)
